subtask.role: You are a DevOps Engineer specializing in Kubernetes. Implement subtask 8.3.

context.overview: Configure Kubernetes secrets, service mesh integration, and observability stack for production readiness

requirements.description: Set up Kubernetes secrets for sensitive configuration data (API keys, database credentials). Configure service mesh (Istio/Linkerd) for advanced traffic management and security. Implement monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana and logging with ELK stack or similar. Create ConfigMaps for non-sensitive configuration.
